help_quote_batch_title: The Quote by Batch feature allows you to enter a list of codes directly from Excel, significantly improving the time spent creating a quotation.
help_quote_batch_steps: To create a Batch Quotation, follow these steps:
help_quote_batch_step1: Step 1: In an Excel document, you must have the list of codes to be quoted along with their respective quantities, and copy the list in the order shown in the figure.
help_quote_batch_step2: Step 2: The codes selected in the Excel document must be copied into the text box located at the upper left side of the Dax page. (See image)

formula_note: If the Cost and Weight of a Part Number are included in the formula, add the variable as a Dynamic Variable.
